message:
Fix 9 dependency type bugs: blocks→parent-child for epic children

7 wa-3cyp children (wa-x4rq, wa-1nkt, wa-29cb, wa-5nd5, wa-8vla,
wa-1360, wa-11zm) and 1 wa-rsaf child (wa-bo6f) had "blocks" dep
type instead of "parent-child", creating scheduling deadlocks.
Also added missing parent-child link for wa-3bin to wa-3cyp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
